summary: RFP Enterprise Features Testing - Iteration 23. Tested enterprise-grade RFP generation with 15-section structure, markdown tables, sub-headings, bullets, and DOCX export. Backend /api/rfp/generate produces structured content with tables and sub-headings. DOCX export correctly renders markdown tables as Word tables with teal headers, sub-headings as Heading 2, bullet points, numbered lists, and bold text. Frontend SAMPLE_SECTIONS contains all 15 enterprise sections. UI verified: RFP Generator modal opens, enterprise template button shows 15 sections, form fields work.

minor.issue: Occasional 502 gateway timeout when generating content for complex sections (Technical Requirements). This is expected due to AI generation time.

Backend: POST /api/rfp/export DOCX renders bullet points as List Bullet style - PASS
Backend: POST /api/rfp/export DOCX renders numbered lists as List Number style - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: Backend section_instructions dict provides detailed formatting guidance for each of 15 sections
Backend uses 20K char knowledge base context (combined[:20000]) - up from previous 5K
Backend _export_docx function correctly parses markdown tables (| syntax) and creates Word tables with teal headers
Backend handles sub-headings (###), bullets (-), numbered lists (1.), and bold (**text**) in DOCX export
Frontend RfpContent component parses markdown tables and renders as HTML <table> with styled headers
Frontend handles sub-headings, bullets, numbered lists, and bold text rendering
Frontend batches sections (2 per call) to avoid 60s gateway timeout
seed_data_creation: Used existing indexed sources in default notebook for RFP generation tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: RFP Enterprise features fully implemented. Key endpoints: POST /api/rfp/generate (accepts template_sections array, batches 2 sections per call), POST /api/rfp/export (format='docx' or 'pdf'), POST /api/rfp/parse-template. Frontend RFPGenerator.jsx has SAMPLE_SECTIONS with 15 enterprise sections. RfpContent component renders markdown tables, bullets, sub-headings, bold text. DOCX export creates professional Word documents with teal-header tables, Heading 2 sub-headings, List Bullet/Number styles.
